name: Whiteboard Card
description: Cards as core whiteboard units: rich text editing (tiptap), drag positioning, free resize, SQLite persistence, double-click creation
currentState: Tiptap rich text editor replaces textarea. SQLite persistence via cards table (Schema -> Repository -> IPC -> Preload). Double-click canvas creates card. BubbleMenu for Bold/Italic/Strike. TaskList extension for checklists. Content stored as tiptap JSON. All card state (content, position, size) persists across app restarts.
decisions: Single content field, first paragraph auto-bold via CSS (.ProseMirror > :first-child)
Default size 208x160px, max 400x320px, default is minimum
Bottom-right drag handle for free resize, hover shows 3-dot grip icon
Content overflow scrolls inside card (scrollbar-width:thin), no conflict with drag
Drag logic (useCardMove) and resize logic (useCardResize) separated into independent hooks, Whiteboard orchestrates
Resize sets global cursor: se-resize (data-card-resizing attribute)
click vs drag distance threshold 5px, isDragged flag set in pointerMove
Three-layer state: unselected -> selected (ring-2 ring-primary) -> editing (tiptap editable)
Double-click card enters editing mode, timestamp check two clicks < 300ms = double-click
Editing mode stopPropagation prevents drag, onBlur auto-saves
Esc exits editing/deselects, Delete/Backspace deletes selected card, Enter enters editing
Click whiteboard blank area deselects and exits editing
Context menu: Open Detail / Edit / Pin / Resize / Duplicate / Delete
Double-click whiteboard blank area creates new card, cursor auto-focuses
Tiptap replaces textarea: StarterKit (no heading/codeBlock/blockquote/horizontalRule) + TaskList + TaskItem + Placeholder
Content stored as tiptap JSON string (JSON.stringify(editor.getJSON())), empty card content = ''
BubbleMenu from @tiptap/react/menus shows Bold/Italic/Strike toggles when text selected in edit mode
SQLite cards table: id, content, x, y, width, height, z_index, is_pinned, created_at, is_deleted (soft delete)
Three-layer architecture: CardRepository -> registerCardHandlers IPC -> window.api.card preload API
All mutations (content, position, size, delete) persist to SQLite immediately
Double-click canvas creates card at click position (percentage coords), auto-enters editing mode

tasks.task: Data model: title+content merged to single content field
Drag/resize logic refactored to independent hooks
Tiptap rich text editor (StarterKit + TaskList + Placeholder)
CardRepository CRUD + IPC handlers + preload API
Database persistence for content, position, size, delete
Double-click canvas to create new card

tasks.scope: Click card slides out 480px Sheet from right, shows full content + items, editable, Esc/click outside closes
Right-click card shows ContextMenu: Open Detail / Edit / Pin / Duplicate / Delete, with shortcut hints
